Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Use the town map to navigate your surroundings and move from one location to another.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 420}Visit as many spots in town as you can, and they'll be added to the map.[n]{f 1 1}
